name: IHasDynamicProperties
summary: Extends the NET interface IDynamicMetaObjectProvider to include provision of dynamic properties.

methods.name: GetProperty
methods.summary: Fetches the property value specified by the string argument.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the dynamic property to obtain. As with real NET properties, this name is case-sensitive.

returns.doc: Value of the dynamic property retrieved.

throws.when: Name is not a valid dynamic property.

methods.name: SetProperty
methods.summary: Sets a value to the property specified by the string argument.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the dynamic property to set. As with real NET properties, this name is case-sensitive.

params.name: value
params.doc: Value to set. This should match the type of the dynamic property.

returns.doc: The same object as was passed to argument 'value'. This enables settor chaining.

throws.when: Name is not a valid dynamic property.
Value does not cast to the expected dynamic property type.
Setting to the property is not supported.

properties.name: DynamicMemberNames
properties.summary: Enumerates the dynamically added members of the object by name.
